resources.string: Skipping Ads at a Super Price ! Binge without breaks !
No Ads at all ! Chance to watch everything for free !
Get %1$s for just %2$s as you would by watching %3$s Ads !
A one-of-a-kind chance ! Enjoy all dramas freely !
Watch 1 more ad to unlock 1 episode
Watch ad to unlock the next episode for free
You can remove ads by making a payment for an improved viewing experience.
You can watch ads to unlock the current episode, give it a try!
Please press \"Continue\" if you choose to start using our app.
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
Displays more info about the list item.
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.
%1$s episodes have been unlocked in batches
Your network connection is abnormal or your Google account is abnormal. You can contact our customer service to report the problem.
Completing the following tasks will earn bonus
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
"You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
Your current device does not support %1$s payment.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Your session has expired. Please re-login.
"Can't connect to server,please try again later"
Recharge is not supported in the current country/region

"Hey there, drama fan! Quick heads up: if you delete your account, you'll miss out on some awesome shows and can't get your data back(Including any property such as coins, bonus, etc). Sure you wanna do this? If you've got concerns, hit us up. We'd hate to see you go! Thanks for the memories!"
Reservation Successful. You can find it in My List.
"The content is gone~ You can go back to [Discover] to browse other popular content."
The videos that you haven’t downloaded yet
Unable to download, try again later!
Subscription has expired, please subscribe and download!
Please check the content you entered！
Your email has been successfully verified.
Please unlock the previous episode first
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
The password on the account must be changed to continue
Set your new password with the verification code that was sent to you.
Enable permissions to receive notifications more promptly
Refusing authorization will make it difficult to load ads, which may affect your viewing experience. Please consider authorizing next time.
Some features in %1$s may not work properly without HMS Core, which is not installed on your device.
%1$s is unable to use HMS Core. Launch Optimizer (Phone Manager) or go to Settings, enable all permissions for %2$s (including auto-launch and secondary launch), and try again.
It appears that you have an unofficial version of HMS Core (%1$s) installed on your device. Please uninstall HMS Core from Settings and return to this app to install the official version.
Add to list to watch later
The video is loading slowly. Click to switch the quality.
The network is slow, the best quality has been selected for you.
Keep watching your favorite clips in a mini player while you browse. Multi-tasking made easy!
We have unlocked episode %1$s for you
The provided username or password is incorrect.
Claim daily bonus. Unlock new episodes.
Sorry, no relevant videos were found
Dear user, logging in to the account is to better protect your assets and viewing records. We will not store your information, please rest assured to log in!
"By continuing, you agree to the %1$s and %2$s."
💕️️ By staying logged in, you can:
Get our latest recommendations in time.
Save your usage records, which is convenient for reading or watching next time.
❤️ Wait a minute, are you sure you want to log out of the account?
[ Rewards ] Entrance has been moved here
[ My List ] Entrance has been moved here
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Do you want to learn more?
Do you want to synchronize the asset information and viewing records of the historical accounts to the current account?
Multiple accounts have been detected to avoid property loss. Please try again.
The property and movie viewing records of your historical account have been restored.
❗Detected that multiple accounts exist on this device.
MFA verification is required to authenticate.
Coupons for the first %1$s month of your monthly membership
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Confirm to delete the currently selected?
Go to the Home to discover more popular new dramas
Each product can only be claimed once
To protect your property, please log in to your account to avoid loss of information !

Blind eyes could blaze like 4 meteors and be gay, Rage, rage against Blind eyes could blaze like 4 meteors and be gay, Rage, rage against the dying of the light....the dying of the light....Blind eyes could blaze like 4 meteors and be gay, Rage, rage against the dying of the light....
Choose the type of notifications you want to receive
Allow app to send you notifications?
"Thanks for your interest. We will share more once you're back online."
Offline download is exclusive rights for members, paid dramas can only be watched within the membership period.
"You are back online! Let's pick up where we left off"
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
Cannot reset password without registered/verified email or phone number
Password should have 6 or more characters.
Please check the content you entered！
Please enter the correct area code
Your phone number has been successfully verified.
"Enable the Picture - in - Picture ，you won't miss any wonderful content."
Due to policy restrictions, you can only top up fixed amounts. The closest amount has been recommended for you.

"Please provide a detailed description of your problem: (Please use the space below to provide a detailed description of your problem or request. We will review your inquiry and aim to get back to you within 3–7 working days.)
Problem type: (please select Function Issues,Payment Issues, Suggestions, others)
Relevant Information: UID (Do not delete): %1$s App Version (Do not delete): %2$s Operating System and Device Model (Do not delete): %3$s Screenshots or Attachments (if applicable): Payment Issues - Order number & account ID (required): "
Sign in and get a gift!
Join membership now for unlimited ad-free access
Unlock all series for one year
Unlock all series for one month
Unable to display, please update the version
Unlock all series for one week
Sorry, we were unable to access your privileges, please tap to try again.
Easily earn gold coins! The president is waiting for you!
Click me to check in and claim rewards! ✨
Sign in for one more day (ง •̀_•́)ง and win coins!
"Didn't sign in today. Missed it! What a loss 💸"
You can watch your favorite short dramas for free now!
Click! The gold coins will be credited to your account right away!!
Click it! Receive coins and unlock immediately >>
Get great gifts every day! Come and sign in now!
Come and claim your daily rewards!
Come and sign in right away!
Freebies are given away every day. Come and sign in to earn rewards now!
Your treasure trove for drama binge-watching — Gold coins are ready! 🎁
"Limited-time recall! The benefits won't wait for you ⏳!"
A super-popular drama series is coming 🎊. Want to watch it for free?
"✨It's time for the check-in reward! Claim it now!"
"❓ Who hasn't claimed their free viewing quota yet?"
"🎁 Today's gift package has been credited to your account!"
🌟 Ding! Your 7 - day consecutive check - in achievement is waiting to be unlocked ⏳
Sign in daily to get bonuses.
Get a bonus just by checking in.
Want to unlock episodes for free?
Easily claim rewards by checking in.
"You're the only one who hasn't claimed yet!"
The CEO has sent you an invitation 📨
"💵Grab %1$s Bonus! They're looking forward to you!"
💌%1$s Bonus just for you! Hurry and get it!
"💵%1$s Bonus for you! Don't pass this up!"
"💸%1$s Bonus coming? Don't wait! binge now!"
"💸Give you %1$s Bonus gifts! Don't miss the opportunity!"
"💰%1$s Bonus for you! Don't let it slip!"

"1. All interpretation rights of Bonus belong to ShortMax 2. Bonus can only be used to watch dramas, valid for 5 days, and will be automatically expired and liquidated after expiration 3. Gold coins will be used first when watching dramas, if not enough, Bonus will be used automatically 4. The sign-in refreshes every evening at 0 a.m(UTC+0)"
Watch all ads to earn an extra %1$s
When we love the world, we live in it.
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Are you sure to delete your search record?
Please upgrade your application version first
"You're late! The reward has already been collected."
Search frequency is too high, please try again later
Account merge has been completed on this device. If you still have issues, please contact support.
This device has previously logged-in accounts and visitor accounts.
Benefits are being migrated. Please wait
Please select the account to switch to
Turn on sign-in reminders to successfully sign in retroactively, +%1$s Bonus
Watch an ad to successfully sign in retroactively and earn +%1$s Bonus
Sign Up Confirmation code is missing.
A confirmation code was sent to
Please enter the code below to confirm your account.
Enter your information to sign up.
"%s falsify area, Represents the height[%.1fdp] of drag at run time, It does not show anything."
The content view in SmartRefreshLayout is empty. Do you forget to add it in xml layout file?
Your subscription to %1$s has expired and you cannot unlock any episodes. Do you want to resubscribe?
Your account has been banned from subscribing due to multiple chargebacks.
Your current subscription will expire on %1$s, at which time the new subscription will take effect.
Your new subscription will take effect immediately, and the remaining time of your current subscription will be converted to the time of the new subscription.
You already have an active subscription
VIP Can Enjoy All Dramas For Free

"1. Subscription instructions (1) The subscription function is only to improve the user experience of the APP. It does not affect the normal use of the APP whether you subscribe or not. 2. Benefits description (1) After purchasing the weekly card PRO/monthly card PRO/annual card Pro, you will watch any episode without limit. (2) Ad-free: After unlocking, except for incentive ads, other types of ads will no longer be displayed. (3) 1080P resolution: Video playback supports selecting 1080P resolution. (4) Unlimited local download of HD videos. 3. About automatic renewal (1) Subscription will be automatically renewed 24 hours before the valid period. You can cancel the automatic renewal at any time. There is no refund when the renewal is successful. 4. How to cancel the subscription Please note, you will need to cancel through the Google Play Store settings on your device. (1) Open the Google Play Store app. (2)Tap on the profile on top right to check that you're signed in to the correct Google account. (3) Tap on Payments & Subscriptions and select the subscription you want to cancel. If the issue persists after trying the above methods,please reach out to us at shorttv.service@shorttv.live."

"1. Subscription instructions (1) The subscription function is only to improve the user experience of the APP. It does not affect the normal use of the APP whether you subscribe or not. 2. Benefits description (1) After purchasing the weekly card PRO/monthly card PRO/annual card Pro, you will watch any episode without limit. (2) Ad-free: After unlocking, except for incentive ads, other types of ads will no longer be displayed. (3) 1080P resolution: Video playback supports selecting 1080P resolution. 3. About automatic renewal (1) Subscription will be automatically renewed 24 hours before the valid period. You can cancel the automatic renewal at any time. There is no refund when the renewal is successful. 4. How to cancel the subscription (1) Open%1$sand click on the avatar in the top right corner. (2) Click on Payment and Subscription and then click on Subscription. (3) Select your ShortMax subscription. (4) Click on Cancel Subscription."
Subtitles failed to load. Please check your connection and try again.
Your account with the nickname %1$s and %2$s has already purchased this product. Do you want to switch accounts?
Complete tasks to receive gold coin rewards
Policy limits recharge to a set amount; a recommended sum is provided for you.

"1.Unlocking Paid Content: Gold coins and Bonuses are for unlocking paid content within the application. 2.Recharge Equivalency: 1 Coin=1 Bonus. Please note that refunds are not supported for recharging. 3.Bonus Expiration: Bonuses will expire after a specified period. Please check the expiration time of your Bonuses in the \"My Wallet\" section of the app."
The coins your purchased have been reissued.
The subscription privileges and coins you purchased have been credited.
The series you purchased has been unlocked, please check within <%1$s - %2$s>
Your subscription privileges have been activated.
Add the reason you think bad
Prohibit request ads by compliance, please check GDPR settings
Placement is not bidding type, please check placement bidding type
Please check the country of the IP of the ad requesting device in service country
IP is empty or ua is empty
The sdk version used for the new insertion style is too low. Please upgrade to version 3550 and above
New ad slot exceeded daily request limit
Please update to version 2310 or later
"You've submitted feedback! Please don't submit again."
Tell us how this ad made you feel
Initialization check error, please check the AndroidManifest
Network is unavailable, please try again later.
Report this ad to help us improve
Watch the entire video to claim your reward
Jump to details page or third party application
Shake or click to learn more
Go to details page or third-party application
Go to details page or third-party application
